_description: Pre-commit quality gate: runs lint + typecheck + tests before any commit

hooks.command: bash -c 'if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q "git commit"; then echo "[pre-commit] Running quality gate before commit..."; if [ -f package.json ]; then npm run typecheck 2>&1 || exit 2; npm run lint 2>&1 || exit 2; fi; if [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then python -m mypy . --strict 2>&1 || exit 2; python -m ruff check . 2>&1 || exit 2; fi; echo "[pre-commit] Quality gate passed."; fi'
hooks.description: Block commits if typecheck or lint fails

hooks.command: bash -c 'if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q "git commit"; then echo "[pre-commit] Scanning for secrets..."; if grep -r "password\s*=\s*[\x27\x22][^\x27\x22]" src/ --include="*.ts" --include="*.py" --include="*.js" -l 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then echo "[pre-commit] ERROR: Possible hardcoded password found. Aborting."; exit 2; fi; if grep -r "AKIA[0-9A-Z]\{16\}" src/ --include="*.ts" --include="*.py" 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then echo "[pre-commit] ERROR: AWS access key found. Aborting."; exit 2; fi; echo "[pre-commit] Secrets scan passed."; fi'
hooks.description: Block commits with potential secrets or hardcoded credentials
